notes.entropy_thresh: Below this sustained = premature certainty / rigidity lock
notes.kl_thresh: Above this = instability spike / friction event
notes.branch_thresh: Below this = narrow scope / low reversibility
notes.rolling_window: Token steps for rolling average smoothing
notes.calibration: Calibrated against GPT-2 test runs: coherent text ~3.1 mean entropy / ~111 branching, distorted text ~1.5 mean entropy / ~15 branching. Larger models require recalibration. Run on known coherent and distorted text pairs to establish model-specific baselines.
